articles.title: Bitcoin Won’t Be an Effective Currency, Store of Value or Medium of Exchange, Says Hedge Fund Legend Ray Dalio
articles.description: In a new interview on CNBC’s Squawk Box, hedge fund veteran Ray Dalio says Bitcoin (BTC) is getting more attention than it deserves. The founder of asset management firm Bridgewater Associates says that what Bitcoin accomplished in the last 12 years is amazing, but investors still have better choices than putting their money on the […] The post Bitcoin Won’t Be an Effective Currency, Store of Value or Medium of Exchange, Says Hedge Fund Legend Ray Dalio appeared first on The Daily Hodl.

articles.title: Cardano DJED Depegging Reignites Stablecoin Backing Debate
articles.description: Cardano's Djed stablecoin depegged on a few days after its launch, reigniting the debate on reserve requirements.

articles.title: Ethereum developers to open public testing of Shanghai-Capella upgrade on Feb. 7
articles.description: The Ethereum network is to activate the Zhejiang public test network on Feb. 7 as part of its preparation for the Shanghai-Capella upgrade in March.

articles.title: Luna Classic token price rises to highest level since November
articles.description: The old Terra ecosystem tokens are on the rise today with Luna Classic surging 20% in the last 24-hour trading period.

articles.title: Terra USTC surges 66% following approval to re-peg to $1
articles.description: Terra Classic Stablecoin Terra UST (USTC) has surged over 66% following a governance approval to re-peg the stablecoin. The post Terra USTC surges 66% following approval to re-peg to $1 appeared first on CryptoSlate.

articles.title: Bitcoin Explosion to $1,000,000 Is Now on the Table, Says Quant Analyst PlanB – Here’s His Latest Forecast
articles.description: The popular quantitative analyst PlanB is updating his forecast on Bitcoin (BTC) after crypto kicked off the year with a strong rally. PlanB tells his 1.8 million Twitter followers that the bottom has arrived for Bitcoin and predicts massive growth. The analyst is best known for his stock-to-flow Bitcoin model, which predicts an asset’s value changes […]

articles.title: Polygon Shows Strong 2023 Start, What’s Behind Its Success?
articles.description: Polygon (MATIC) has been on a tear lately, growing 14% in the past several days and outperforming both Bitcoin and Ethereum. This surge is due to several factors, including increased institutional interest, new partnerships, and overall bullish sentiment in the crypto market.
